product.name: OKAYLOVE DIY Cluster Eyelashes (Styles Vixen & Tilt)
target_audience: 寻求专业嫁接睫毛平替的女性

hook.first_3s_text: If you really like like anime, manga type extensions...
hook.mechanism: Directly addresses the specific desires (anime lashes) and frustrations (cost, time, poor retention of professional services) of a niche audience to create immediate resonance.

selling_points: 可搭配下睫毛打造完整妆容

script_outline: 钩子：展示最终动漫感眼妆效果
痛点：对比专业嫁接的时间和金钱成本
解决方案：展示OKAYLOVE产品，强调细节和独特性
证明：展示上眼效果，特写睫毛细节
remake.voiceover: 分享一个省钱小秘密，花1/10的钱就能get到超火的动漫感睫毛！
ai_image_prompts: A beautiful woman with flawless makeup showcasing her spiky, anime-style false eyelashes, close-up shot on her eye, soft-focus background, beauty blogger aesthetic, high-resolution.
ai_video_prompts: TikTok style video of a beauty influencer unboxing and reviewing anime-style cluster lashes, she holds the product close to the camera, talking excitedly, then shows the final look, selfie-style.

search_text: 产品：OKAYLOVE DIY Cluster Eyelashes (Styles Vixen & Tilt)。品类：美妆护肤/假睫毛/DIY睫毛。人群：DIY美妆爱好者,动漫/漫画爱好者,假睫毛使用者,寻求专业嫁接睫毛平替的女性。视频类型：UGC口播,痛点解决,开箱展示。钩子：痛点钩子,身份点名，If you really like like anime, manga type extensions...。卖点：动漫/漫画风格,省钱省时,效果媲美专业嫁接,细节丰富不塑料,设计独特。证明：博主佩戴效果展示,产品包装特写。风险：无字幕。适合复刻：专业嫁接睫毛平替。
